overview: A modern, elegant academic portfolio website for Dr. I.C. Sharma — scholar, researcher, and author — featuring 7 pages with publications, research, gallery, timeline, and admin uploads.
features: 7-page academic portfolio (Home, About, Publications, Research, Timeline, Gallery, Contact)
Dark mode toggle that persists across pages
Search and filter publications by title
Animated interactive academic timeline with scroll-reveal effects
Gallery with lightbox viewer for academic photos
Admin upload interface for cover images, PDFs, and gallery photos
Responsive design for all screen sizes
Elegant serif typography with off-white, navy, beige color palette
